title: Change the primary button color and add a hover state
problem: The sacrificial Tauri React toy app has an intentionally rough PrimaryButton component with a hard-coded background color and no hover state. Update only that button so the factory can prove the cosmetic-tweak loop against a real public repository.
context: Target repository: github.com/zakkeown/protostar-toy-ttt. The component lives at src/components/PrimaryButton.tsx in the sibling toy repo. The change should be branch-per-run and delivered as a pull request against main.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The primary button color is changed from the scaffold seed value and the button includes a visible hover state.
The pull request CI check named build-and-test succeeds on the toy repo.

toolPermissions.reason: Build the toy Tauri React TypeScript app after the cosmetic change.
Run package manager, git, and GitHub delivery commands for the dogfood PR.
Call LM Studio over loopback and GitHub for dogfood PR delivery.

constraints: Change only the toy repo button component unless an adjacent style file is strictly required.
Do not merge the pull request.
Do not modify the Protostar factory implementation during this dogfood run.
stopConditions: Stop if the factory cannot target github.com/zakkeown/protostar-toy-ttt.
Stop if the generated change touches unrelated toy app files.
Stop if GitHub delivery cannot open a pull request with the scoped dogfood token.
